summary: Plan the M7 UI, localization, and visual quality track
acceptance_criteria: Convert M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 and the accepted M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 evidence into an explicit M7 UI/localization/visual quality-track task plan.

Create or update downstream M7 task JSON for UI/localization planning, i18n foundation, design tokens and asset slots, app shell quality, map presentation, district inspector, appointment flow, player guidance, UI regression matrix, and UI/localization exit validation as appropriate.
Downstream task dependencies must ensure planning and handoff review precede implementation, and all UI/localization/visual tasks must close before M7 exit or be explicitly deferred with rationale.

Every downstream task must inherit systems/QA conditions: i18n outside sim-core, React/client state outside authoritative WorldState, Pixi render-cache-only, GameCommand/query boundaries, player/debug separation, full Human Gate list, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, and locale-code risk handling.

The plan must not implement UI, i18n, tokens, assets, app shell, package code, content-source facts, save migration, release artifacts, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save, production art, or manual node battle behavior.
The plan must not mark formal content lock accepted or alter M5/M6/M7 gate outcomes.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for created or updated M7 UI/localization task files

lead_orchestrator.next_action: Spawn systems_architect to produce the M7 UI/localization quality-track plan.

notes: This task exists because the product-owner M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 directive was received after the original M7 task graph had already advanced.
The source directive is stored at project/messages/inbox/M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001__product-owner.md.
The accepted visual handoff is stored at project/messages/outbox/M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001__MSG-20260628-M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF__visual_design_reviewer.md.
The accepted culture review is stored at content-source/m7-beta-culture-review/beta-culture-review-evidence.json.

M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 remains dependency-ready, but this planning task is selected first to incorporate the product-owner UI/localization/visual directive before downstream UI implementation.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and outside 1.0 mainline unless a later Human Gate reverses it.
Formal content lock remains a future Human Gate.
human_gates: manual playthrough acceptance where human judgment is required
commercial, release, store, branding, logo, or trademark decisions
telemetry, analytics, remote collection, accounts, paid services, or secrets
arbitrary-code mods, runtime scripting extensions, or Workshop support
cloud-save implementation, network persistence, or any account-backed save service
frozen product, platform, core architecture, technology stack, simulation authority, deterministic, or historical-policy changes
manual node battle reversal or any formal 1.0 scope reversal
scheduling_reason: Selected before M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 so the mid-stage product-owner UI/localization/art directive is represented in the M7 task graph before any UI/localization implementation tasks proceed.
next_action: systems_architect writer returns REVIEW handoff for qa_reviewer.
